pr.title: Record: EMA-GPU + Multi-Order N-gram Backoff + PE Confidence (val_bpb=0.9393)

output.summary: GPU-resident EMA plus entropy-adaptive multi-order n-gram backoff with pre-enrichment confidence accelerates training and enriches sliding-window eval cache.
techniques: GPU-resident EMA keeps shadow weights local to boost step throughput
Score-first, backward-look multi-order n-gram backoff with entropy-adaptive alpha built during sliding-window eval
Pre-enrichment confidence signal modulates n-gram mixing after GELU/SmearGate embed prep
